message:
Merge PR #2014: fix(doctor): use scoped Beads instance for agent label updates

Bug fix: uses scoped Beads instance for bd.Update() instead of shelling out to bd CLI,
which could route writes to the wrong database.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2014
Author: l0g1x (Krystian Gebis)
